speaker: speaker1
text: I'm looking for a good multivitamin . Can you recommend one ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . Come with me to the vitamin section .

speaker: speaker1
text: I knew there would be a few choices , but this selection is huge !

speaker: speaker2
text: You're looking for a multi though , right ?

speaker: speaker1
text: That's right . Just a simple multi-vitamin that I can take every day .

speaker: speaker2
text: Okay . Then I recommend this one . It's made especially for men about your age .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh ! You took the guesswork right out of that one .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's my job ! Is there anything else I can assist you with ?
